scripts.build: pnpm run build:api && pnpm run build:web
scripts.lint: pnpm run lint:api && pnpm run lint:web
scripts.test: pnpm run test:api && pnpm run test:web && pnpm run typecheck:contracts
scripts.typecheck: pnpm run typecheck:api && pnpm run typecheck:web && pnpm run typecheck:contracts
scripts.verify:fast: pnpm run lint && pnpm run typecheck && pnpm run test && pnpm run build
